name: Wah Sun Handbags International Holdings Limited
summary: Wah Sun Handbags International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and trades in non-leather hand-bag products in the United States, Spain, and internationally. Its hand-bag products are made of PU, PVC, and various textile materials. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Shatin, Hong Kong. Wah Sun Handbags International Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Wah Sun International Holdings Limited.
